concerns.detail: Inserted text contains profanity (尼玛) and insulting characterization (无名懒猴/nameless lazy monkey) constituting personal attacks rather than substantive criticism
concerns.excerpt: 优点尼玛...无名懒猴我们喜欢你

concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive discussion challenging readers about whether they would reject UNC offers due to the listed advisors, suppressing legitimate observation about the reputational consequences of the blacklist entries
concerns.excerpt: (想问一句，UNC发offer，你们都还去不去。笑死。有没有UNC是最好去处的来说“我拒了”。)
